prompts.name: First Meeting
prompts.text: Create the feeling of a first meeting, with curious eye contact, gentle tension, and a sense of possibility.

prompts.name: Quiet Morning
prompts.text: Create a quiet morning moment with soft light, relaxed posture, and peaceful everyday detail.

prompts.name: After the Rain
prompts.text: Create a scene just after rain with wet surfaces, fresh air, soft reflections, and calm renewal.

prompts.name: Farewell
prompts.text: Create a farewell moment with restrained emotion, meaningful distance, and subtle body language.

prompts.name: Discovery
prompts.text: Create a discovery moment where the subject notices something important, with focused attention and visual curiosity.

prompts.name: Secret
prompts.text: Create a secretive moment with hushed atmosphere, close framing, and a sense of hidden information.

prompts.name: Preparation
prompts.text: Create a preparation moment with tools, clothing adjustments, focused expression, and anticipation.

prompts.name: Rest After Journey
prompts.text: Create a resting moment after a journey, with tired but peaceful expression and travel-worn details.

prompts.name: Magical Awakening
prompts.text: Create a magical awakening moment with subtle glow, surprised expression, and controlled supernatural energy.

prompts.name: Royal Arrival
prompts.text: Create a royal arrival moment with elegant posture, grand setting, and ceremonial atmosphere.

prompts.name: Battle Ready
prompts.text: Create a battle-ready moment with stable stance, focused expression, and dramatic but clean composition.

prompts.name: Cafe Date
prompts.text: Create a gentle café-date feeling with warm light, soft expression, drinks or desserts, and intimate everyday charm.

prompts.name: Late Night Work
prompts.text: Create a late-night work moment with desk light, papers or screens, tired focus, and quiet atmosphere.

prompts.name: Festival Evening
prompts.text: Create an evening festival moment with lanterns, food stalls, crowd warmth, and colorful celebration.

prompts.name: Hidden Power
prompts.text: Create the feeling of hidden power emerging, using subtle energy, intense gaze, and restrained visual drama.
